SEARCH
Package com.appointment.service

Class BookingService

java.lang.Object
com.appointment.service.BookingService
public class BookingService extends Object
Service class responsible for managing appointment booking operations.

This class implements the core business logic of the system, including appointment creation, booking, cancellation, modification, and notification handling.

It coordinates between the repository layer, validation rules, and notification services.

  • Constructor Details

    • BookingService

      public BookingService(AppointmentRepository appointmentRepository, NotificationService notificationService, Clock clock)
      Constructs a BookingService with required dependencies.
      Parameters:
      appointmentRepository - repository used to store appointments
      notificationService - service used to send notifications
      clock - clock used for time-based operations
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if any dependency is null

  • Method Details

    • addRule

      public void addRule(BookingRuleStrategy rule)
      Adds a booking rule to be applied before confirming an appointment.
      Parameters:
      rule - the booking rule strategy
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if rule is null

    • createSlot

      public Appointment createSlot(TimeSlot slot, AppointmentType type)

    • listAll

      public List<Appointment> listAll()
      Returns all appointments in the system.
      Returns:
      list of appointments

    • viewAvailableSlots

      public List<Appointment> viewAvailableSlots()
      Returns all available appointment slots.
      Returns:
      list of available appointments

    • book

      public Appointment book(String appointmentId, User user)
      Books an available appointment for a user after validation.
      Parameters:
      appointmentId - the appointment ID
      user - the user booking the appointment
      Returns:
      the confirmed appointment
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if inputs are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if appointment not found
      IllegalStateException - if slot unavailable or rule fails

    • cancelAndMakeAvailable

      public void cancelAndMakeAvailable(String appointmentId)
      Cancels a confirmed appointment and makes it available again.
      Parameters:
      appointmentId - the appointment ID
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if appointment not found
      IllegalStateException - if appointment not confirmed

    • cancelFutureOnly

      public void cancelFutureOnly(String appointmentId)
      Cancels an appointment only if it is in the future.
      Parameters:
      appointmentId - the appointment ID
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if appointment is not in the future

    • modifyFutureAppointment

      public Appointment modifyFutureAppointment(String appointmentId, TimeSlot newSlot)
      Modifies a future appointment.
      Parameters:
      appointmentId - the appointment ID
      newSlot - the new time slot
      Returns:
      updated appointment
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if appointment is not in the future

    • modifyAsAdmin

      public Appointment modifyAsAdmin(String appointmentId, TimeSlot newSlot)
      Modifies an appointment as an administrator.
      Parameters:
      appointmentId - the appointment ID
      newSlot - the new time slot
      Returns:
      updated appointment

    • sendRemindersForUpcomingHours

      public int sendRemindersForUpcomingHours(int hours)
      Sends reminders for appointments occurring within the next given hours.
      Parameters:
      hours - number of hours ahead
      Returns:
      number of reminders sent
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if hours invalid input: '<'= 0

    • requireAppointment

      private Appointment requireAppointment(String appointmentId)
      Retrieves an appointment by ID.
      Parameters:
      appointmentId - appointment ID
      Returns:
      appointment
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if not found

    • validateSlot

      private void validateSlot(TimeSlot slot)
      Validates a time slot.
      Parameters:
      slot - time slot
      Throws:
